name: TaxDown
oneliner: AI-driven digital tax platform that automates personal tax filing and optimisation, backed by BBVA Spark
finserv: BBVA Spark (innovation arm of Europe's 2nd-largest bank) as sole seed investor; direct banking distribution from day one
team: Madrid-based fintech founders; BBVA Spark backing implies strong finserv operational support
thesis: TaxDown demonstrates that incumbents (BBVA) are already co-investing in AI tax tooling from seed stage — validating the Tax Optimisation gap as commercially viable. European geography and bank-backing align with thesis criteria.
